---
title: 'Resources'
date: '2021-11-12T16:53:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Biblical Hebrew Crash Course'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '3246657697883880040'
blogger_filename: '/p/resources.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Biblical Hebrew Crash Course/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;</p><p><br /></p><p>At the moment, I am using:&nbsp;<span style="text-align: center;">Basics of Biblical Hebrew Grammar by Pratico and Van Pelt, (get the</span><span style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.amazon.com/Basics-Biblical-Hebrew-Workbook-Third/dp/0310533554/ref=sr_1_4?keywords=basics+of+hebrew&amp;qid=1636335985&amp;qsid=146-0390380-1124221&amp;sr=8-4&amp;sres=031053349X%2C0310533554%2C0310100232%2C0369600371%2C031053576X%2C0310098424%2C0310520673%2C1097942023%2C9657493072%2C1728725631%2C9657493080%2C1097936902%2C1532601905%2C0310270227%2C1097935353%2C1097941469&amp;srpt=ABIS_BOOK" style="text-align: center;" target="_blank">workbook&nbsp;</a><span style="text-align: center;">and</span><span style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.amazon.com/Basics-Biblical-Hebrew-Grammar-Third/dp/031053349X/ref=sr_1_3?keywords=basics+of+hebrew&amp;qid=1636335887&amp;qsid=146-0390380-1124221&amp;sr=8-3&amp;sres=031053349X%2C0310533554%2C0310100232%2C0369600371%2C031053576X%2C0310098424%2C0310520673%2C1097942023%2C9657493072%2C1728725631%2C9657493080%2C1097936902%2C1532601905%2C0310270227%2C1097935353%2C1097941469&amp;srpt=ABIS_BOOK" style="text-align: center;" target="_blank">textbook</a><span style="text-align: center;">, they are separate). I will add to this as I move forward.&nbsp;</span></p><div><span style="text-align: center;"><br /></span></div><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p>
